channel.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2022
item.description:
GUI Development

  • GTK4.crstars49 - Bindings for GTK4 with Crystalized API

    • Data Formats

  • json-schemastars3 - convert JSON serializable classes into a JSON Schema representation

    • Cryptography

  • ed25519stars3 - the Ed25519 elliptic curve public-key signature system

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Aug 22nd - Aug 28th, 2022
item.description:
Network Protocols

  • mqtt-client.crstars3 - A fast and lightweight MQTT client

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Jul 11th - Jul 17th, 2022
item.description:
Algorithms and Data structures

  • csuuidstars12 - A Chronologically Sortable UUID
  • secure-remote-passwordstars3 - SRP-6a protocol for authentication over an insecure network

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal May 30th - Jun 5th, 2022
item.description:
Logging and monitoring

  • fiber_metrics.crstars7 - Track run time, wait time, or memory allocations per Fiber, method or block

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal May 2nd - May 8th, 2022
item.description:
Processes and Threads

  • concurrent.crstars42 - Simplified concurrency using streams/pipelines, waitgroups, semaphores, smores and more

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2022
item.description:
Misc

  • definedstars15 - macros for conditional compilation based on constant definitions, version requirements, or environment variable settings

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Dec 27th - Jan 2nd, 2021
item.description:
C bindings

  • wasmer-crystalstars60 - Bindings for the wasmer WebAssembly runtime
  • fftw.crstars11 - Bindings for FFTW library

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Dec 6th - Dec 12th, 2021
item.description:
Game Development

  • MyECSstars11 - A Sparse Entity Component System Framework for Crystal

    • C bindings

  • nlopt.crstars2 - Bindings for NLOpt

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Nov 15th - Nov 21st, 2021
item.description:
CLI Builders

  • Athena Consolestars9 - Allows for the creation of CLI based commands

    • HTML/XML Parsing

  • docx_cr_converterstars5 - parse DOCX Word

    • Third-party APIs

  • mollie.crstars14 - Mollie Payments API wrapper (Creditcard, PayPal, Apple Pay, Sofort, Klarna, ...)

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Oct 18th - Oct 24th, 2021
item.description:
C bindings

  • augeas.crstars6 - Bindings for Augeas

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Sep 27th - Oct 3rd, 2021
item.description:
Networking

  • mac-addressstars2 - Library for working with MAC addresses

    • Internationalization

  • Rosettastars28 - A blazing fast internationalization (i18n) library with compile-time key lookup supporting YAML and JSON formats

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Aug 30th - Sep 5th, 2021
item.description:
Internationalization

  • Lensstars16 - A multiformat internationalization (i18n) shard for Crystal. Supports Gettext, Ruby YAML, etc.

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Aug 23rd - Aug 29th, 2021
item.description:
Internationalization

  • crystal-i18nstars14 - An internationalization library inspired by Ruby-I18n
  • i18n.crstars24 - Internationalization shard

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Aug 2nd - Aug 8th, 2021
item.description:
Network Protocols

  • crystal-bacnetstars0 - BACnet protocol implementation with BACnet/IP client

    • Converters

  • crunitsstars6 - Tool for converting units of measure (miles to kilometers, celsius to fahrenheit etc)

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Jun 28th - Jul 4th, 2021
item.description:
Third-party APIs

  • tmdb.crstars2 - The Movie DB (TMDb) api wrapper

    • Network Protocols

  • simple_rpcstars61 - RPC Server and Client for Crystal. Implements msgpack-rpc protocol

    • CLI Utils

  • meetstars34 - Start a jitsi meeting quickly from the comfort of your command line

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Algorithms and Data structures

  • crystalgstars34 - A Generic Algorithm Library

    • CLI Utils

  • oqstars172 - A performant, and portable jq wrapper to facilitate the consumption and output of formats other than JSON; using jqstars23.3k filters to transform the data

    • Database Tools

  • queryitstars20 - A setupless terminal based SQL query runner

    • Dependency Injection

  • HardWirestars18 - A compile-time non-intrusive dependency injection system

    • Framework Components

  • mochistars23 - Authentication shard inspired by Devise supporting: Authenticable, Confirmable, Invitable & more
  • motion.crstars48 - Object oriented frontend library for Amber
  • tourmalinestars134 - Telegram bot framework with an API loosely based on telegraf.js

    • Misc

  • burocracia.crstars21 - burocracia.cr the dependecyless shard to validate, generate and format Brazilian burocracias such as CPF, CNPJ and CEP

    • ORM/ODM Extensions

  • avramstars144 - A database wrapper for reading, writing, and migrating Postgres databases

    • Queues and Messaging

  • mosquitostars174 - Redis backed periodic and ad hoc job processing

    • Serverless Computing

  • FaaStRuby - Serverless Software Development Platform for Ruby and Crystal
  • secrets-envstars6 - Extends ENV module to read values injected by docker / kubernetes secrets and other orchestration tools

    • LSP Language Server Protocol Implementations

  • crystallinestars279 - Crystalline is an implementation of the Language Server Protocol written in and for the Crystal Language

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Compression

  • Gzip - readers and writers of gzip format (Crystal stdlib)
  • Zip - readers and writers of zip format (Crystal stdlib)
  • Zlib - readers and writers of zlib format (Crystal stdlib)

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
CLI Utils

  • coinstars7 - Command-line application that performs currency conversion via the Fixer API

    • Debugging

  • backtracer.crstars11 - Shard aiming to assist with parsing backtraces into a structured form
  • debug.crstars86 - debug!(…) macro for pp-style debugging

    • Algorithms and Data structures

  • splay_tree_mapstars10 - Splay Tree implementation that conforms to the Hash ducktype

    • Misc

  • serf-handler.crstars1 - Framework for building Serf handlers, with a suite of useful builtin capabilities

    • Network Protocols

  • stompstars0 - STOMP protocol

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Algorithms and Data structures

  • s2_cellsstars0 - S2 Geometry for spatial indexing

    • HTTP

  • link-headerstars1 - HTTP Link Header Parser

    • acmecrystalstars4 - Reformats crystal code in acme

item.description:

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Data Formats

  • Crystalizerstars36 - (De)serialize any Crystal object; supporting JSON, YAML, and Byte formats out of the box

    • Blockchain

  • Axentrostars194 - A custom blockchain platform

    • Validation

  • Athena Validatorstars4 - Robust & flexible validation framework

    • Services and Apps

  • Invidiousstars8.5k - Invidious is an alternative front-end to YouTube

item.description:

  • werkstars18 - Dead simple task runner with concurrent support, ideal for local CI

    • Misc

  • mDNSstars8 - DNS Service Discovery and multicast DNS

item.description:

  • stripe.crstars41 - Stripe api wrapper

item.description:

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2020
item.description:
CLI Builders

  • Keimenostars13 - A lightweight text user interface library in Crystal

    • Third-party APIs

  • googlestars19 - Google API wrapper
  • office365stars8 - Microsoft Graph API wrapper
  • host_metastars2 - A Web Host Metadata (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6415) client
  • web_fingerstars7 - A WebFinger (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7033) client

    • Data Generators

  • primestars1 - A prime number generator

    • Machine Learning

  • mxnet.crstars20 - Bindings for MXNet

    • Misc

  • iterm2stars5 - Display images within the terminal using the ITerm2 Inline Images Protocol

    • Science and Data analysis

  • ishistars42 - Graph plotting package with a small API and sensible defaults powered by gnuplot

    • Tools

  • public_suffixstars2 - A small library designed to make the Public Suffix List (https://publicsuffix.org/) easier to use

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Network Protocols

  • amqp-client.crstars56 - AMQP 0-9.1, a messaging protocol, implemented by eg. RabbitMQ

    • Web Frameworks

  • Shivneristars21 - Component based MVC web framework for crystal targeting good code structures, modularity & performance

item.description:

  • Cadmiumstars192 - NLP library based heavily on naturalstars9.9k

  • CrSignalsstars9 - Signals/slots notification library

item.description:

item.description:

  • CrOTPstars59 - HOTP and TOTP implementation for two factor authentication

    • DevOps

  • DPPMstars105 - An easy, universal way to install and manage applications as packages (mostly Linux)

    • Misc

  • retriable.crstars36 - Simple DSL to retry failed code blocks

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:

item.title: veelenga/awesome-crystal Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
CLI Builders

  • OptionParser - command-line options processing (Crystal stdlib)

    • Data Formats

  • CSV - parsing and generating for comma-separated values (Crystal stdlib)
  • INI - INI file parser (Crystal stdlib)
  • JSON - parsing and generating JSON documents (Crystal stdlib)
  • XML - parsing and generating XML documents (Crystal stdlib)
  • YAML - parsing and generating YAML documents (Crystal stdlib)

    • HTTP

  • HTTP::Client - HTTP client (Crystal stdlib)
  • HTTP::Server - HTTP server (Crystal stdlib)
  • HTTP::WebSocket - HTTP WebSocket client (Crystal stdlib)

    • Network Protocols

  • OAuth - OAuth consumer (Crystal stdlib)
  • OAuth2 - OAuth2 client (Crystal stdlib)
  • OpenSSL - bindings to libssl (Crystal stdlib)

    • Networking

  • ipaddress.crstars40 - Library to handle IPv4 and IPv6 addresses

    • Template Engine

  • ECR (Embedded Crystal) - compile time template language which uses plain crystal expressions (Crystal stdlib)

    • Testing

  • Spec - spec framework (Crystal stdlib)
